title: St. Philip’s Seminary / The Oratory of St. Philip Neri-Toronto - Canada.ca
content:
## St. Philip’s Seminary / The Oratory of St. Philip Neri-Toronto
You are eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Bachelor of Thomistic Thought
- Bachelor of Catholic Thought
- Bachelor of Fundamental Theology
- Master of Thomistic Though
You are not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
